summary: Live PR inventory shard classified without GitHub mutations. #92529 is quarantined for central security handling based on the validator security-sensitive gate; unrelated non-security PRs remain classified independently. Close, merge, fix, and raise-PR paths are blocked or disabled by the job permissions, so open non-security PRs are kept for maintainer/author follow-up instead of being mutated.

actions.reason: Focused useful PR with sufficient proof and clean hydrated state, but this job does not allow merge or fix actions and requires maintainer signal for focused bug fixes.

The work appears covered by merged hydrated candidate #93441, but closeout is not permitted in this job and the source PR remains a credited historical contributor lane.

Quarantine exact PR #92529 for central OpenClaw security handling; do not close, merge, label, comment on, or open a fix PR for this security-sensitive item.
